-- This query creates the SPS.Products view from the SLS.RawProdAuto table linked to the 
-- nightly refresh from Salsify CSV

--SELECT * FROM SLS.Products
--DROP VIEW SLS.Products
CREATE VIEW SLS.Products AS
SELECT 
  TRY_CAST([SKU] as varchar(4000)) 				                [SKU]
, COALESCE([Aligned Item Number], [SKU])                        [Aligned Item Number]
, TRY_CAST([UPC] as varchar(4000))        	              [UPC]
, TRY_CAST([EAN] as varchar(4000))        	              [EAN]
, TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU1] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Secondary SKU]
, TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU2] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Secondary SKU2]
, TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU3] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Secondary SKU3]
, TRY_CAST([Base Model SKU] as varchar(4000)) 			        [Base Model SKU]
, TRY_CAST([Brand] as varchar(4000)) 				            [Brand]
, TRY_CAST([Sub-Brand] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Sub-Brand]
, TRY_CAST([description] as varchar(4000)) 			            [description]
, TRY_CAST([Product Line] as varchar(4000)) 	                [Family (Product Line)]
, TRY_CAST([Category] as varchar(4000)) 		                [Product Subcategory]
, TRY_CAST([Subcategory] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Product Usage]
, TRY_CAST([Division] as varchar(4000)) 			    	    [Channel]
, TRY_CAST([Commercial / Residential] as varchar(4000))         [Commercial / Residential]
, TRY_CAST([Item Type] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Product Type]
, TRY_CAST([Status] as varchar(4000)) 			    	        [Status]
, TRY_CAST([NPR Date] as DATE)              			        [NPR Date]
, TRY_CAST([Customer Available Date] as DATE) 	                [Customer Available Date]
, TRY_CAST([Updated Customer Available Date] as DATE) 	        [Updated Customer Available Date]
, TRY_CAST([TLC Warehouse ETA] as DATE) 		                [TLC Warehouse ETA]
, TRY_CAST([Received in TLC Warehouse] as DATE)                 [Received in TLC Warehouse]	
, TRY_CAST([FOB Cost] as FLOAT) 				    	        [FOB Cost]
, TRY_CAST([Freight Cost] as FLOAT) 			    	        [Freight Cost]
, TRY_CAST([Landed Cost] as FLOAT) 			       	 	        [Landed Cost]
, TRY_CAST([Wholesale Price] as FLOAT) 			   	 	        [Wholesale Price]
, TRY_CAST([US Duty Rate % (HTC)] as FLOAT) 	    	        [US Duty Rate % (HTC)]
, TRY_CAST([Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)] as FLOAT) 		        [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)]
, TRY_CAST([Item Weight] as FLOAT)              		        [Item Weight]
, TRY_CAST([40 HC QTY] as FLOAT) 		            	        [40' HQ Container QTY]
, TRY_CAST([Exclusivity] as varchar(4000)) 			            [Exclusivity]
, TRY_CAST([Manufactured / Purchased] as varchar(4000)) [Manufactured / Purchased]
, TRY_CAST([Amazon ID (ASIN)] as varchar(4000)) [ASIN]

FROM
SLS.RAWProdAuto
WHERE [SKU]<>'SKU'

-- Larger File Process
-- DROP VIEW SLS.Products_CustItem_Pre
CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_CustItem_Pre AS
SELECT TRY_CAST([SKU] as varchar(4000)) [SKU],
       COALESCE([Aligned Item Number], [SKU]) [Aligned Item Number],
       TRY_CAST([UPC/EAN] as bigint) [UPC],
       TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU1] as varchar(4000)) [Secondary SKU],
       TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU2] as varchar(4000)) [Secondary SKU2],
       TRY_CAST([Secondary SKU3] as varchar(4000)) [Secondary SKU3],
       TRY_CAST([Base Model SKU] as varchar(4000)) [Base Model SKU],
       TRY_CAST([Brand] as varchar(4000)) [Brand],
       TRY_CAST([Sub-Brand] as varchar(4000)) [Sub-Brand],
       TRY_CAST([description] as varchar(4000)) [description],
       TRY_CAST([Family (Product Line)] as varchar(4000)) [Family (Product Line)],
       TRY_CAST([Product Subcategory] as varchar(4000)) [Product Subcategory],
       TRY_CAST([Product Usage] as varchar(4000)) [Product Usage],
       TRY_CAST([Channel] as varchar(4000)) [Channel],
       TRY_CAST([Commercial / Residential] as varchar(4000)) [Commercial / Residential],
       TRY_CAST([Product Type] as varchar(4000)) [Product Type],
       TRY_CAST([Status] as varchar(4000)) [Status],
       TRY_CAST([NPR Date] as DATE) [NPR Date],
       TRY_CAST([Customer Available Date] as DATE) [Customer Available Date],
       TRY_CAST([Updated Customer Available Date] as DATE) [Updated Customer Available Date],
       TRY_CAST([TLC Warehouse ETA] as DATE) [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       TRY_CAST([Received in TLC Warehouse] as DATE) [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       TRY_CAST([FOB Cost] as FLOAT) [FOB Cost],
       TRY_CAST([Freight Cost] as FLOAT) [Freight Cost],
       TRY_CAST([Landed Cost] as FLOAT) [Landed Cost],
       TRY_CAST([Wholesale Price] as FLOAT) [Wholesale Price],
       TRY_CAST([US Duty Rate % (HTC)] as FLOAT) [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       TRY_CAST([Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)] as FLOAT) [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       TRY_CAST([Item Weight] as FLOAT) [Item Weight],
       TRY_CAST([40 HC QTY] as FLOAT) [40' HQ Container QTY],
       TRY_CAST([Exclusivity] as varchar(4000)) [Exclusivity],
       TRY_CAST([Manufactured / Purchased] as varchar(4000)) [Manufactured / Purchased],
       TRY_CAST([AAFES ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [AAFES ID],
       TRY_CAST([ABT ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [ABT ID],
       TRY_CAST([Ace Hardware ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Ace Hardware ID],
       TRY_CAST([Amazon ID (ASIN)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Amazon ID (ASIN)],
       TRY_CAST([America's Test Kitchen ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [America's Test Kitchen ID],
       TRY_CAST([AutoQuotes ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [AutoQuotes ID],
       TRY_CAST([Bass Pro ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Bass Pro ID],
       TRY_CAST([BBB ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [BBB ID],
       TRY_CAST([Bencoff Ventures ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Bencoff Ventures ID],
       TRY_CAST([Best Buy (CA) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Best Buy (CA) ID],
       TRY_CAST([Best Buy (US) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Best Buy (US) ID],
       TRY_CAST([Bi Mart ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Bi Mart ID],
       TRY_CAST([Blains ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Blains ID],
       TRY_CAST([Bluestem Brands ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Bluestem Brands ID],
       TRY_CAST([Camping World ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Camping World ID],
       TRY_CAST([Canadian Tire ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Canadian Tire ID],
       TRY_CAST([Cost Plus ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Cost Plus ID],
       TRY_CAST([Costco (CA) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Costco (CA) ID],
       TRY_CAST([Costco (US) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Costco (US) ID],
       TRY_CAST([Crate & Barrel ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Crate & Barrel ID],
       TRY_CAST([Cutlery & More ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Cutlery & More ID],
       TRY_CAST([Do It Best ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Do It Best ID],
       TRY_CAST([Electronic Express ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Electronic Express ID],
       TRY_CAST([Fleet Farm ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Fleet Farm ID],
       TRY_CAST([Focus Camera, Inc. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Focus Camera, Inc. ID],
       TRY_CAST([Food 52 ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Food 52 ID],
       TRY_CAST([Guest Supply ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Guest Supply ID],
       TRY_CAST([GWT - International ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [GWT - International ID],
       TRY_CAST([H2O Labs, Inc. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [H2O Labs, Inc. ID],
       TRY_CAST([Harris Teeter Inc, ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Harris Teeter Inc, ID],
       TRY_CAST([HD Supply ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [HD Supply ID],
       TRY_CAST([Home Hardware CA ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Home Hardware CA ID],
       TRY_CAST([Hy-Vee ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Hy-Vee ID],
       TRY_CAST([Incentive Concepts, LLC ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Incentive Concepts, LLC ID],
       TRY_CAST([Jack L. Marcus Inc. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Jack L. Marcus Inc. ID],
       TRY_CAST([JCP Item Number] AS nvarchar(4000)) [JCP Item Number],
       TRY_CAST([JCP LOT Number] AS nvarchar(4000)) [JCP LOT Number],
       TRY_CAST([Jetro Cash & Carry Restaurant Dpt ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Jetro Cash & Carry Restaurant Dpt ID],
       TRY_CAST([Kohl's ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Kohl's ID],
       TRY_CAST([Kroger ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Kroger ID],
       TRY_CAST([Leatherman Tool Group, LLC ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Leatherman Tool Group, LLC ID],
       TRY_CAST([Lee Valley ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Lee Valley ID],
       TRY_CAST([Life At Home ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Life At Home ID],
       TRY_CAST([London Drugs ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [London Drugs ID],
       TRY_CAST([Lowes (CA) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Lowes (CA) ID],
       TRY_CAST([Lowes (US) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Lowes (US) ID],
       TRY_CAST([Macy's ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Macy's ID],
       TRY_CAST([Mason Companies, Inc. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Mason Companies, Inc. ID],
       TRY_CAST([MCX ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [MCX ID],
       TRY_CAST([Meijer ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Meijer ID],
       TRY_CAST([Menards ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Menards ID],
       TRY_CAST([Mercer Tool Corp. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Mercer Tool Corp. ID],
       TRY_CAST([MyRegistry.com ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [MyRegistry.com ID],
       TRY_CAST([Navy ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Navy ID],
       TRY_CAST([Nexcom ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Nexcom ID],
       TRY_CAST([NFM ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [NFM ID],
       TRY_CAST([Nordstrom ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Nordstrom ID],
       TRY_CAST([Office Depot ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Office Depot ID],
       TRY_CAST([Optics Planet ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Optics Planet ID],
       TRY_CAST([Overstock ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Overstock ID],
       TRY_CAST([Pottery Barn ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Pottery Barn ID],
       TRY_CAST([QVC ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [QVC ID],
       TRY_CAST([Sam's item Number] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Sam's item Number],
       TRY_CAST([Sam's item Number (LG)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Sam's item Number (LG)],
       TRY_CAST([Silverstar ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Silverstar ID],
       TRY_CAST([Smart & Final ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Smart & Final ID],
       TRY_CAST([Snappy App., Inc. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Snappy App., Inc. ID],
       TRY_CAST([Sur La Table ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Sur La Table ID],
       TRY_CAST([Target ID (TCIN)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Target ID (TCIN)],
       TRY_CAST([Texas DOCJ ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Texas DOCJ ID],
       TRY_CAST([THD OMSID (US)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [THD OMSID (US)],
       TRY_CAST([The Home Depot (CA) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [The Home Depot (CA) ID],
       TRY_CAST([The Home Depot (US) ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [The Home Depot (US) ID],
       TRY_CAST([The Joneses ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [The Joneses ID],
       TRY_CAST([Total Wine ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Total Wine ID],
       TRY_CAST([Tractor Supply ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Tractor Supply ID],
       TRY_CAST([True Brands ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [True Brands ID],
       TRY_CAST([Union Supply Co. Inc.] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Union Supply Co. Inc.],
       TRY_CAST([Veterans Canteen Service ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Veterans Canteen Service ID],
       TRY_CAST([Walkenhorsts ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Walkenhorsts ID],
       TRY_CAST([Walmart WIN (CA)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Walmart WIN (CA)],
       TRY_CAST([Walmart Item ID (CA)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Walmart Item ID (CA)],
       TRY_CAST([Walmart WIN (US)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Walmart WIN (US)],
       TRY_CAST([Walmart Item ID (US)] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Walmart Item ID (US)],
       TRY_CAST([Wayfair CA SKU] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Wayfair CA SKU],
       TRY_CAST([Wayfair SKU] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Wayfair SKU],
       TRY_CAST([Wegmans ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Wegmans ID],
       TRY_CAST([WERCSMART ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [WERCSMART ID],
       TRY_CAST([Williams Sonoma ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Williams Sonoma ID],
       TRY_CAST([World Market Mgmt Services, LLC. ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [World Market Mgmt Services, LLC. ID],
       TRY_CAST([Zoro ID] AS nvarchar(4000)) [Zoro ID]
FROM SLS.RAWProdAuto
WHERE [SKU] <> 'SKU'


/* 

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SLS.Products_CustItem 
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SLS.Products 

[CustItem] NOT IN ('N/A', 'None', 'Pending') 

*/

-- DROP VIEW SLS.Products_CustItem 
CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_CustItem
AS
SELECT [SKU],
       [Aligned Item Number],
       [CustName],
       [CustItem],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU],
       [Secondary SKU2],
       [Secondary SKU3],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Manufactured / Purchased]
FROM
(SELECT * FROM SLS.Products_CustItem_Pre) p 
UNPIVOT([CustItem] FOR [CustName] in(
  "AAFES ID"
, "ABT ID" 
, "Ace Hardware ID" 
, "Amazon ID (ASIN)" 
, "America's Test Kitchen ID" 
, "AutoQuotes ID" 
, "Bass Pro ID" 
, "BBB ID" 
, "Bencoff Ventures ID" 
, "Best Buy (CA) ID" 
, "Best Buy (US) ID" 
, "Bi Mart ID" 
, "Blains ID" 
, "Bluestem Brands ID" 
, "Camping World ID" 
, "Canadian Tire ID" 
, "Cost Plus ID" 
, "Costco (CA) ID" 
, "Costco (US) ID" 
, "Crate & Barrel ID" 
, "Cutlery & More ID" 
, "Do It Best ID" 
, "Electronic Express ID" 
, "Fleet Farm ID" 
, "Focus Camera, Inc. ID" 
, "Food 52 ID" 
, "Guest Supply ID" 
, "GWT - International ID" 
, "H2O Labs, Inc. ID" 
, "Harris Teeter Inc, ID" 
, "HD Supply ID" 
, "Home Hardware CA ID" 
, "Hy-Vee ID" 
, "Incentive Concepts, LLC ID" 
, "Jack L. Marcus Inc. ID" 
, "JCP Item Number" 
, "JCP LOT Number" 
, "Jetro Cash & Carry Restaurant Dpt ID" 
, "Kohl's ID" 
, "Kroger ID" 
, "Leatherman Tool Group, LLC ID" 
, "Lee Valley ID" 
, "Life At Home ID" 
, "London Drugs ID" 
, "Lowes (CA) ID" 
, "Lowes (US) ID" 
, "Macy's ID" 
, "Mason Companies, Inc. ID" 
, "MCX ID" 
, "Meijer ID" 
, "Menards ID" 
, "Mercer Tool Corp. ID" 
, "MyRegistry.com ID" 
, "Navy ID" 
, "Nexcom ID" 
, "NFM ID" 
, "Nordstrom ID" 
, "Office Depot ID" 
, "Optics Planet ID" 
, "Overstock ID" 
, "Pottery Barn ID" 
, "QVC ID" 
, "Sam's item Number" 
, "Sam's item Number (LG)" 
, "Silverstar ID" 
, "Smart & Final ID" 
, "Snappy App., Inc. ID" 
, "Sur La Table ID" 
, "Target ID (TCIN)" 
, "Texas DOCJ ID" 
, "THD OMSID (US)" 
, "The Home Depot (CA) ID" 
, "The Home Depot (US) ID" 
, "The Joneses ID" 
, "Total Wine ID" 
, "Tractor Supply ID" 
, "True Brands ID" 
, "Union Supply Co. Inc." 
, "Veterans Canteen Service ID" 
, "Walkenhorsts ID" 
, "Walmart WIN (CA)" 
, "Walmart Item ID (CA)" 
, "Walmart WIN (US)" 
, "Walmart Item ID (US)" 
, "Wayfair CA SKU" 
, "Wayfair SKU" 
, "Wegmans ID" 
, "WERCSMART ID" 
, "Williams Sonoma ID" 
, "World Market Mgmt Services, LLC. ID" 
, "Zoro ID")) AS up

--
--

CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_SingleSKU 
-- drop view SLS.Products_SingleSKU 
-- select * from SLS.Products_SingleSKU 
as SELECT SKU as [Lookup SKU],
       [Aligned Item Number] as SKU,
       Brand,
       description,
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Type],
       Status,
       [NPR Date],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       Channel
FROM SLS.Products

CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_SingleSKU_F
as
SELECT *
FROM SLS.Products_SingleSKU_Temp
UNION
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [SKU] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40 HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU] is null
      AND [SKU] NOT IN (
                           select distinct [Lookup SKU] FROM SLS.Products_SingleSKU_Temp
                       )

CREATE VIEW SLS.Products_SingleSKU_Temp
as
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU] is not null
UNION
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU2] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU2] is not null
UNION
SELECT [SKU],
       [UPC],
       [Secondary SKU3] as [Lookup SKU],
       [Base Model SKU],
       [Manufactured / Purchased],
       [Wholesale Price],
       [US Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Canadian Duty Rate % (HTC)],
       [Item Weight],
       [40' HQ Container QTY],
       [Exclusivity],
       [Updated Customer Available Date],
       [TLC Warehouse ETA],
       [Received in TLC Warehouse],
       [FOB Cost],
       [Freight Cost],
       [Landed Cost],
       [Channel],
       [Commercial / Residential],
       [Product Type],
       [Status],
       [NPR Date],
       [Customer Available Date],
       [Brand],
       [Sub-Brand],
       [description],
       [Family (Product Line)],
       [Product Subcategory],
       [Product Usage]
FROM [SLS].[Products]
WHERE [Secondary SKU3] is not null
